context:
MEMO

To: All Warehouse Staff
From: Operations Manager
Date: January 18
Subject: Inventory Count

The annual inventory count will begin at 7:00 a.m. on Saturday, January 27. The warehouse will be closed to deliveries that day. Staff assigned to counting teams should report to Zone A at 6:45 a.m. for instructions and equipment.

Please wear safety shoes and bring your employee badge. Lunch will be provided at noon in the training room. Team leaders must submit completed count sheets to the operations office before leaving.

Employees who cannot attend should notify their supervisor by January 22.

items.prompt: What is the memo about?
items.explanation: Le mémo organise le comptage annuel du stock.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What will happen to deliveries on January 27?
options: They will be moved to Zone A
They will be counted at noon
items.explanation: L'entrepôt sera fermé aux livraisons ce jour-là.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: Les équipes doivent se présenter à 6 h 45.

items.explanation: Le déjeuner sera fourni dans la salle de formation.

context:
WINTER PROMOTION — NOVA PRINT

Order 500 or more business cards before February 15 and receive free standard delivery anywhere in mainland France.

Choose from:
- Classic matte paper
- Recycled textured paper
- Premium glossy paper

Design assistance is available for €25. Customers who upload print-ready files should select PDF format and include a 3 mm bleed. Standard production takes four business days after file approval. Express production is available for an additional fee.

Use code WINTER500 at checkout. The offer cannot be combined with other discounts.

items.prompt: What does the promotion include?
items.explanation: La livraison standard est offerte pour une commande d'au moins 500 cartes.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

context:
Customer Review

I booked a weekend cooking class at Maison Basilic for my sister's birthday. The instructor, Amélie, explained each step clearly and gave everyone time to practice. Our group prepared three dishes, including a dessert.

The kitchen was modern and spotless, and all ingredients were included in the price. The only disappointment was that the class started twenty minutes late because the previous group had not finished. Staff offered us coffee while we waited, and the session was extended so we still received the full two hours.

I would attend another class, especially one focused on bread making.

— Karim D.

items.prompt: Why did Karim book the class?
items.explanation: Il l'a réservée pour l'anniversaire de sa sœur.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: How many dishes did the group prepare?
items.explanation: Le groupe a préparé trois plats.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What caused the class to start late?
items.explanation: Le groupe précédent n'avait pas terminé.

items.prompt: How did the business respond to the delay?

context:
RIVERFRONT CONFERENCE — DAY 2 SCHEDULE

08:30–09:15 Registration and coffee — Main Hall
09:15–10:00 Keynote: Building Sustainable Teams — Auditorium
10:15–11:00 Workshop A: Remote Collaboration — Room 204
10:15–11:00 Workshop B: Practical Data Security — Room 210
11:15–12:00 Panel Discussion: The Future of Urban Work — Auditorium
12:00–13:30 Lunch — Garden Terrace
13:30–14:15 Product Demonstrations — Exhibition Area
14:30–15:15 Closing Remarks and Prize Draw — Auditorium

Workshop rooms hold forty participants. Seats are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
